calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donald Smith of Law Offices of Ann Rankin telephone number 510-653-8886 for Plaintiff Providence Condominium Association.
Defendant Robin Parker telephone number 650-477-0644 in Propria Persona.

The Parties met and conferred. Upon conclusion, the Parties reported that they reached the following settlement: In exchange for a lump sum payment made to the collection agency in the amount of $10,000.00, Providence agrees to dismiss and release Mr. Parker of all claims. Defendants Robin Parker and Roxanne Parker's Claim of exemption is taken off calendar. All garnishment orders are hereby vacated. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ann Rankin, Esq. of the Law Offices of Ann Rankin for plaintiff;
Michael E. Marguez, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael E. Marquez, Tel. 650.343.2611, appearing specially for defendant Robin Parker, also present in court.

RULING: Defendant did not bring any evidence of his monthly income, his spouse's monthly income and the expenses listed at paragraph 4 of the claim of exemption to the hearing. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT ROBIN PARKER'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied. The levying officer is directed to withhold $250 per month as payment on the judgment. (After hearing, ORDER SIGNED and served on all parties.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Off Calendar
